long_description:
[STGSRE] Storage agent desired daemonset pods are not ready for at least 20 minutes  - Alert-ID: STG-BLK-SYSDIG-326 in mzone2l7 is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/stg-blk-sysdig-002-initial-storage-agent-pod-restart.html 
TIP Situation: Storage agent Daemonset pod is down
TIP Short Description:storage-agent pods are not ready
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-volume:::mzone2l7:workloadname:storage-agent
TIP Short Description: Storage agent Daemonset pod is down

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    sum by(kube_cluster_name, kube_daemonset_name)(kube_daemonset_status_number_ready{kube_daemonset_name=~"storage-agent", kube_cluster_name !~ "^us-south-ngdc-test-staging01.*"}) / sum by(kube_cluster_name, kube_daemonset_name)(kube_daemonset_status_desired_number_scheduled{kube_daemonset_name=~"storage-agent", kube_cluster_name !~ "^us-south-ngdc-test-staging01.*"}) < 1 = 0.995
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2l7' and kube_daemonset_name = 'storage-agent'

Time:             12/03/2025 08:15 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://eu-fr2.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/046ffe990811498fad77d175c08cef71/db898621-ecd3-4ddd-93c3-d6651c732478?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F117701732%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [STGSRE] Storage agent desired daemonset pods are not ready for at least 20 minutes 
Description:  Storage agent desired daemonset pods are not ready for at least 20 minutes
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   sum by(kube_cluster_name, kube_daemonset_name)(kube_daemonset_status_number_ready{kube_daemonset_name=~"storage-agent", kube_cluster_name !~ "^us-south-ngdc-test-staging01.*"}) / sum by(kube_cluster_name, kube_daemonset_name)(kube_daemonset_status_desired_number_scheduled{kube_daemonset_name=~"storage-agent", kube_cluster_name !~ "^us-south-ngdc-test-staging01.*"}) < 1
Duration: 20 m
